ddls:
CREATE TABLE "blockchains" (
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blockchain */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the blockchain network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the blockchain network */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of the blockchain network (e.g., public, private) */,
  "network_version" TEXT /* Version of the blockchain network */,
  "consensus_algorithm" TEXT /* Consensus algorithm used by the blockchain network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blockchain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blockchain the block belongs to */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* The block's block number */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of the block */,
  "date" TEXT /* A calculated field -- the date of the block */,
  "transactions_cnt" INTEGER /* The number of transactions in the block */,
  "uncles_cnt" INTEGER /* The number of uncles in the block */,
  "block_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the block */,
  "parent_block_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the parent block */,
  "gas_limit" INTEGER /* Gas limit of the block */,
  "gas_used" INTEGER /* Gas used by the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_blockchain_id FOREIGN KEY ("blockchain_id") REFERENCES blockchains ("blockchain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block the transaction belongs to */,
  "transaction_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the transaction */,
  "from_address" TEXT /* Address that sent the transaction */,
  "to_address" TEXT /* Address that received the transaction */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., contract call, token transfer) */,
  "gas_price" INTEGER /* Gas price of the transaction */,
  "gas_used" INTEGER /* Gas used by the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smart_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smart contract */,
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blockchain the smart contract belongs to */,
  "contract_address" TEXT /* Address of the smart contract */,
  "contract_name" TEXT /* Name of the smart contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of the smart contract (e.g., ERC-20, ERC-721) */,
  "compiler_version" TEXT /* Version of the compiler used to compile the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smart_contracts_blockchain_id FOREIGN KEY ("blockchain_id") REFERENCES blockchains ("blockchain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data field */,
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blockchain the data field belongs to */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the data field */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of the data field (e.g., integer, string) */,
  "field_category" TEXT /* Category of the data field (e.g., block, transaction, smart contract) */,
  "field_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_fields_blockchain_id FOREIGN KEY ("blockchain_id") REFERENCES blockchains ("blockchain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_dictionaries" (
  "dictionary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data dictionary */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data field the dictionary belongs to */,
  "dictionary_name" TEXT /* Name of the data dictionary */,
  "dictionary_description" TEXT /* Description of the data dictionary */,
  "dictionary_category" TEXT /* Category of the data dictionary (e.g., block, transaction, smart contract) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dictionary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_dictionaries_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES data_fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_category" TEXT /* Category of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the blockchain data */,
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blockchain being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the blockchain data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_category" TEXT /* Category of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_blockchain_id FOREIGN KEY ("blockchain_id") REFERENCES blockchains ("blockchain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blockchain the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of the version (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_blockchain_id FOREIGN KEY ("blockchain_id") REFERENCES blockchains ("blockchain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version history */,
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blockchain the version history belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being tracked */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_blockchain_id FOREIGN KEY ("blockchain_id") REFERENCES blockchains ("blockchain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_versions" (
  "field_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field version */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data field the version belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being tracked */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the field version was changed */,
  "field_change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "field_change_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_versions_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES data_fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_versions" (
  "contract_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract version */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the smart contract the version belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being tracked */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract version was changed */,
  "contract_change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "contract_change_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_versions_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES smart_contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "block_versions" (
  "block_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block version */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block the version belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being tracked */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the block version was changed */,
  "block_change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "block_change_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_block_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_block_versions_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_versions" (
  "transaction_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction version */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the version belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being tracked */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction version was changed */,
  "transaction_change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "transaction_change_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_versions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
